title: Chapter 146 – Black Robe (4)
content:
A few people chuckled at Hyeon Won-chang's words as he stood guard beside Jeong Yeon-shin.

Most, however, merely exhaled softly and left it at that.

The black-rank supreme masters were like that. Not one of the six masters standing as escorts to their respective leaders so much as parted their lips.

They simply stared at Hyeon Won-chang with blank expressions.

Just as Jeong Yeon-shin had brought him along, the qi of those stationed beside their leaders was uniformly dense and heavy.

"HAHAHA!"

Only the girl seated near the empty head chair laughed without restraint.

She shook her tied-back hair from side to side while gripping the spear propped against her stone chair's armrest.

There was no malice in it. She simply laughed as though she found it genuinely amusing.

'Senior Yue.'

Hers was a face Jeong Yeon-shin recognized as well.

Divine Spear Yue Shou-lin. Vice Leader of the Divine Sword Squad.

She was a veteran master who had briefly traveled alongside them during the duel with the Namgung family.

Rumor held that some cultivation technique of hers had reached the realm of pure refinement, reversing her body's aging.

Her youthful appearance — looking like a peer of Jeong Yeon-shin — testified to the enormity of her martial power. She was a supreme master who had returned to youth.

"He's truly hilarious! All in white, yet with that kind of nerve! Worthy of serving Lightning Genius, who challenged Azure Qilin himself! Hey, Do-woon — when's the last time someone talked to you like that?"

She spoke while pointing at his eyes with one slender finger. The world lacked entertainment, it seemed. She even appeared to have shed tears for a moment.

"That's enough."

Obeying Heaven Wing Leader Ha Do-woon said.

His expression had only shifted briefly. Now it was calm again.

The composure of a renowned swordsman was clear and tranquil as a polished mirror.

Given that his sword technique was rumored to rival the Radiant Demon Wing Leader's, his internal energy cultivation had to be proportionally immense.

Aside from his sharp temperament, his spirit was rock-solid.

'Obeying Heaven Wing Leader... he noticed. An incredibly powerful supreme master.'

The boy thought.

Black rank was truly a different world. Ha Do-woon seemed to have instantly identified the source of the technique through intuition and sense alone.

Void strike of the mind. It was a technique that demanded caution. Having it become widely known would not serve him well.

Jeong Yeon-shin quietly composed his startled heart. He let nothing show.

With Hyeon Won-chang at his side, he walked over unhurriedly and settled into the seat beside Ma Jin, who was already present.

His uncle attended the gathering as a leader in his own right. He still held the title of Radiant Demon Wing Leader.

—Did you learn that technique from the Fortress Lord?

It was Ma Jin's sound transmission.

—It seems like a technique that manipulates energy waves with some ease, but the sophistication is considerable. You drew a visible reaction from a master. And not just any master — the Obeying Heaven Wing Leader.

—It's incomplete.

Jeong Yeon-shin answered briefly.

He had been genuinely surprised when the void strike succeeded.

It was a technique he had only learned the day before. And his target was a black-rank supreme master.

He hadn't expected it to work. It had to be counted as luck.

There didn't seem to be much practical use for it yet, given how fleeting Ha Do-woon's reaction had been.

'It's hard to use in real combat.'

Even with proper application, the result would be the same. The opponent's immersion was too shallow for a true void strike.

The concentration Jeong Yeon-shin poured into it could have been better spent on other techniques mid-fight.

'I can't become like the Northern Light Sword from before. That was a vicious cycle — always falling behind because I relied only on the familiar Desolate sword.'

Just as he was resolving to dedicate time to training —

"Anyway."

Yue Shou-lin spoke up.

A faint smile lingered on her lips, and her eyes seemed to sparkle with quiet gladness as she regarded the boy.

"Ma Jin's recommendation of you as the next Radiant Demon Wing Leader has been accepted. If not for you, Blue Eye Demon Sword Cheong Myeong was the most likely candidate — but that lanky sword of a man said he'd yield. Wouldn't even put his name forward."

The words that flowed from her smiling lips were surprising.

Jeong Yeon-shin fell silent for a moment.

He hadn't known such discussions had taken place. Cheong Myeong was Radiant Demon Wing's foremost swordsman.

He was more than qualified to be the next leader. In accumulated years and reputation alone, he was incomparable to Jeong Yeon-shin.

There wasn't much cause to think otherwise.

The boy lowered his head slightly. Cheong Myeong knew about his constitution. Naturally, that would weigh on his mind.

'What can I possibly give to the seniors?'

For a fleeting moment, self-reproach and gratitude intertwined in the lowering of his eyelids.

The six leaders and their six guard warriors watched the boy in that moment of vulnerability.

They had all spent long years serving as Desolate Fortress's blades at the heart of the murim. Every one of them.

Various emotions surfaced in their expressions. Curiosity, interest, indifference, boredom...

"Your merits and character have already been evaluated and approved by the Grand Administrator himself. He seems to have already privately questioned everyone who's been on missions with you. Works fast, that crafty one. All that remains is proving your martial power before the fortress."

Yue Shou-lin said. The boy nodded.

"I understand."

"Good. But there's one more thing. A black-rank promotion is different from the lower ranks."

"How so?"

"It's not a duel between equals. As a blue-rank, you must receive recognition from a leader — for your martial realm. A black-rank will face you before everyone."

"I know."

"There's a reason you were invited to the gathering despite not yet being a leader. We were taking volunteers for the duel. Everyone unanimously said they wanted to see you. To see how well your body has been trained, what martial arts you've created, how much you've grown since they last knew you."

CLANG

Yue Shou-lin flicked the shaft of her spear once with her gripping finger.

Her chin swept across the meeting hall, gesturing at the faces of the six leaders.

"They're all the type who wouldn't bother lifting a hand unless something genuinely interested them. Every last one."

The boy's gaze followed her small movement.

The slender swordsman was Azure Sky Leader. The gaunt middle-aged man radiating terrifying spirit light was the Annihilation Team Leader.

Jeong Yeon-shin had met them both several times before, but not since the Hwangbo family mission.

Their eyes, turned toward him now, held something strange. Both had noticed — the young master's energy waves had advanced enormously.

***

"Obeying Heaven Wing Leader's personal feelings are irrelevant."

The Annihilation Team Leader spoke up.

"I oversaw his blue-rank promotion myself. It's only right that I see the results. I'll take on this task on behalf of the leaders."

He was volunteering.

Azure Sky Leader, three seats away, parted his lips.

"This junior has something to say. The Annihilation Team Leader should rest after returning from his mission."

"Hmm."

"This junior had a hand in Lightning Genius's development. When he first entered Radiant Demon Wing, I passed on a spirit pill — though I never expected such extraordinary martial arts to emerge."

"Azure Sky Leader, speak your true intentions."

"I wish to lighten Senior's burden. Since this junior personally laid the groundwork, I have a duty to verify whether Lightning Genius's martial arts are sound."

"I've heard about this. Wasn't it because you lost a bet with Ma Jin? That's all I know of it."

"..."

They were competing to duel the boy.

Azure Sky Leader and the Annihilation Team Leader.

Along with Ma Jin, they were the ones who had annihilated the Hwangbo family.

Their eagerness, dressed up in classical speech, wasn't amusing. Rather, Jeong Yeon-shin simply felt bewildered.

'What is this?'

Just as the stormy youth was muttering inwardly —

"I hope we can conclude this quickly. This matter doesn't require such prolonged discussion."

It was the noblewoman sitting perfectly upright in one corner.

Above her long black hair, ears sharp as precious swords protruded.

Her calm expression suited her beautiful features.

She had maintained complete disinterest without uttering a single word until now, but Jeong Yeon-shin knew her identity.

'Law Enforcement Leader.'

She matched exactly the description he had first received upon entering Radiant Demon Wing.

She was the head of the martial force that enforced Desolate Fortress's laws.

They said she wasn't close with anyone. That she was an object of reverence throughout the fortress.

'I heard the number of people she's arrested within the fortress is beyond counting.'

No fortress warrior liked the Law Enforcement Division or its leader.

It was like how righteous path martial artists viewed Desolate Fortress's masters.

They revered her upright character and profound sword techniques, yet remained wary of the duties she treated as her calling. It was inevitable.

The Law Enforcement Leader slowly parted her lips.

"If you wish to cross hands, request a private duel. Obeying Heaven Wing Leader should also step back from this matter. Once can be excused as a lapse, but drawing your sword again in this Wishing for Peace Sword Hall cannot be permitted. If such behavior occurs again, I will have no choice but to place you under arrest and bring you to my division."

She spoke with finality.

Ha Do-woon's hand, which had been resting on his sword handle while eyeing Jeong Yeon-shin, went still.

As Obeying Heaven Wing Leader, he had seemed on the verge of joining the argument between Azure Sky Leader and the Annihilation Team Leader.

"That..."

Ha Do-woon started to speak but closed his mouth.

"Blocking discussion itself isn't helpful either."

"Receiving a junior's profound martial arts before the fortress warriors is an honorable thing. Be generous."

As the Annihilation Team Leader and Azure Sky Leader spoke in measured tones —

THUD

Ok Su-rim raised her index finger and tapped the stone chair's armrest. Internal energy resonated in the sound.

Silence fell at the reverberating note that spread outward as though the armrest were hollow.

As the supreme master closest to becoming the next Divine Sword Squad Leader, she was presiding over the gathering.

She parted her lips once more.

"I hear all three of you have connections with Lightning Genius. In one way or another. Obeying Heaven Wing Leader's leans somewhat more toward a grudge. Well, even I would covet White Qilin."

"..."

"All of you, step back. Personal feelings have no place in a promotion ceremony. That includes me, since I've been on a mission with him once. Let the Law Enforcement Leader handle it."

"I accept."

The Law Enforcement Leader answered immediately.

No emotion showed on her beautiful face. She didn't seem particularly interested in Jeong Yeon-shin.

She appeared to simply be that kind of person.

Though her expression betrayed nothing, Yue Shou-lin seemed to consider her suitable precisely because of that.

It was a decision anyone could see was right.

The leaders didn't object. Even Obeying Heaven Wing Leader Ha Do-woon slowly nodded.

"You can settle any grudges between leaders after you become one yourself."

He said while looking at Jeong Yeon-shin. The boy simply nodded once in silence and fixed his gaze on the Law Enforcement Leader.

She was already rising to her feet, carrying a single sword.

Soon her retreating figure, jet-black hair swaying carelessly, disappeared without a single backward glance.

"This is bad."

Ma Jin muttered beside him. Jeong Yeon-shin's gaze shifted to his uncle.

The words flowing in a purely familial register felt deeply comfortable.

"Why?"

"The Law Enforcement Division deals with fortress warriors. They have authority to freely access all floors of the Heavenly Gold Martial Arsenal. To develop methods for breaking down and analyzing fortress martial arts."

"So?"

"I heard your martial arts were recently classified as high-level. They're treated as advanced techniques that low-rank warriors can't learn. The Demon Roaring Blood Force, Returning Origin Three Yang Technique, Demon Destroying Azure Unyielding Palm, Eternal Blossom Fist, Radiant Sword Style... They're secret techniques worthy of discussion across all of murim. The Law Enforcement Division must have already analyzed them."

"Ah..."

A small exclamation escaped the boy's lips. It was a somewhat dazed sound.

Ma Jin, his scarred face turning toward Jeong Yeon-shin with concern, stiffened in surprise.

Hyeon Won-chang, who had been leaning just his upper body toward the boy's side while eavesdropping on the leader who still held the title of Radiant Demon Wing Leader, reacted the same way.

"Leader, your nephew is smiling?"

Hyeon Won-chang said.
